languages.text: "Видите ли, в раскаянии нет ни нужды, ни пользы, ибо вера наша не дарует искупления. Но по благости {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g} Себериан преподнесет {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Простору Коронус{/g} последний дар. Станет напоминанием о том, что чем больше человек снискал Его милостей, тем тяжелее бремя ответственности. А для тех, чей хребет веры окажется сломлен под этой ношей, нет иного пути, кроме очищения священным огнем." {n}Голос инквизитора звучит приглушенно и размеренно, придавая вес каждому слову.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Видите ли, в раскаянии нет ни нужды, ни пользы, ибо вера наша не дарует искупления. Но по благости {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g} Себериан преподнесет {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Простору Коронус{/g} последний дар. Станет напоминанием о том, что чем больше человек снискал Его милостей, тем тяжелее бремя ответственности. А для тех, чей хребет веры окажется сломлен под этой ношей, нет иного пути, кроме очищения священным огнем." {n}Голос инквизитора звучит приглушенно и размеренно, придавая вес каждому слову.{/n}

languages.text: "You see, there is neither need nor use in repentance, for our faith grants no redemption. But by the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, Seberian will furnish the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g} with one final gift. It will serve as a reminder that the more one earns of His blessings, the heavier the burden of responsibility becomes. And for those whose backbone of faith should break under that burden, there is no other way but cleansing with holy fire." {n}The Inquisitor's voice sounds muted and measured, lending weight to every word.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Видите ли, в раскаянии нет ни нужды, ни пользы, ибо вера наша не дарует искупления. А для тех, чей хребет веры окажется сломлен под этой ношей, нет иного пути, кроме очищения священным огнем." {n}Голос инквизитора звучит приглушенно и размеренно, придавая вес каждому слову.{/n}

And for those whose backbone of faith should break under that burden, there is no other way but cleansing with holy fire." {n}The Inquisitor's voice sounds muted and measured, lending weight to every word.{/n}

languages.text: “你当明白：忏悔既无必要，也无用处，因为我们的信仰从不给予救赎。但承蒙{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}的恩典，塞贝里安将为{g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}科罗努斯扩区{/g}献上最后一份礼物。这礼物将提醒世人，自祂处获得的恩赐越多，肩负的责任便越沉重。而若信仰的脊梁被这副重担压垮，那除了圣洁火焰的净化，便再无其他归途。”{n}审判官的声音低沉而平稳，字字千钧。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You see, there is neither need nor use in repentance, for our faith grants no redemption. But by the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, Seberian will furnish the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g} with one final gift. It will serve as a reminder that the more one earns of His blessings, the heavier the burden of responsibility becomes. And for those whose backbone of faith should break under that burden, there is no other way but cleansing with holy fire." {n}The Inquisitor's voice sounds muted and measured, lending weight to every word.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “你当明白：忏悔既无必要，也无用处，因为我们的信仰从不给予救赎。但承蒙{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}的恩典，塞贝里安将为{g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}科罗努斯扩区{/g}献上最后一份礼物。这礼物将提醒世人，自祂处获得的恩赐越多，肩负的责任便越沉重。而若信仰的脊梁被这副重担压垮，那除了圣洁火焰的净化，便再无其他归途。”{n}审判官的声音低沉而平稳，字字千钧。{/n}

languages.text: « Voyez-vous, le repentir est vain et stérile, car notre foi n'accorde pas la rédemption. Mais par la grâce de l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}, en mourant, Seberian offrira un dernier cadeau aux {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Étendues de Koronus{/g}. Un rappel à tous que plus on s'avère méritant, plus Ses bénédictions font peser sur nos épaules le fardeau de la responsabilité. Et pour ceux dont l'échine vient à céder sous cette charge, il n'y a pas d'autre issue que la purification par les flammes sacrées. » {n}Calme et mesurée, la voix de l'inquisiteur donne du poids à chacun de ses mots.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You see, there is neither need nor use in repentance, for our faith grants no redemption. But by the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, Seberian will furnish the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g} with one final gift. It will serve as a reminder that the more one earns of His blessings, the heavier the burden of responsibility becomes. And for those whose backbone of faith should break under that burden, there is no other way but cleansing with holy fire." {n}The Inquisitor's voice sounds muted and measured, lending weight to every word.{/n}

languages.text: "İnanç kurtuluş bahşetmediğinden tövbe etmek ne gerekli ne de faydalıdır. Ancak {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un{/g} lütfuyla Seberian, {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Enginliği'ne{/g} son bir hediye sunacak. O'nun nimetlerinden ne kadar çok faydalanırsak sorumluluk yükünün o kadar arttığını hatırlatacak bir hediye. Bu yükün altında inancını yitirecekler için kutsal ateşle arınmaktan başka çare yoktur." {n}Engizisyoncu'nun boğuk ve ölçülü çıkan sesi, her kelimesine ağırlık katıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You see, there is neither need nor use in repentance, for our faith grants no redemption. But by the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, Seberian will furnish the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g} with one final gift. It will serve as a reminder that the more one earns of His blessings, the heavier the burden of responsibility becomes. And for those whose backbone of faith should break under that burden, there is no other way but cleansing with holy fire." {n}The Inquisitor's voice sounds muted and measured, lending weight to every word.{/n}

Ancak {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un{/g} lütfuyla Seberian, {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Enginliği'ne{/g} son bir hediye sunacak. languages.text: «Verá: el arrepentimiento no es necesario ni útil, pues nuestra fe no concede la redención. Pero, por la gracia del {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, Seberian otorgará un último regalo a la {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Extensión de Koronus{/g}: será un recordatorio de que, cuantas más de Sus bendiciones acumulan Sus sirvientes, mayor es el peso de la responsabilidad que conllevan. Y para aquellos cuya fe se fracture bajo esa carga, la única medicina es la purificación mediante fuego santo». {n}La voz del Inquisidor es contenida y comedida, lo que añade peso a cada palabra.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You see, there is neither need nor use in repentance, for our faith grants no redemption. But by the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, Seberian will furnish the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g} with one final gift. It will serve as a reminder that the more one earns of His blessings, the heavier the burden of responsibility becomes. And for those whose backbone of faith should break under that burden, there is no other way but cleansing with holy fire." {n}The Inquisitor's voice sounds muted and measured, lending weight to every word.{/n}

Y para aquellos cuya fe se fracture bajo esa carga, la única medicina es la purificación mediante fuego santo». {n}La voz del Inquisidor es contenida y comedida, lo que añade peso a cada palabra.{/n}

languages.text: "Wie Ihr seht, ist Buße weder nötig, noch sinnvoll, da unser Glaube keine Erlösung gewährt. Aber durch die Gnade des {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperators{/g} wird Seberian der {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus-Ausdehnung{/g} ein letztes Geschenk machen. Es wird alle daran erinnern, dass mit dem Ausmaß Seines Segens die Last der Verantwortung größer wird. Und für jene, deren Glaube unter dieser Last zerbricht, gibt es keinen anderen Ausweg als die Reinigung durch heiliges Feuer." {n}Der Inquisitor spricht gedämpft und überlegt und betont jedes einzelne Wort.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You see, there is neither need nor use in repentance, for our faith grants no redemption. But by the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, Seberian will furnish the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g} with one final gift. It will serve as a reminder that the more one earns of His blessings, the heavier the burden of responsibility becomes. And for those whose backbone of faith should break under that burden, there is no other way but cleansing with holy fire." {n}The Inquisitor's voice sounds muted and measured, lending weight to every word.{/n}

Aber durch die Gnade des {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperators{/g} wird Seberian der {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus-Ausdehnung{/g} ein letztes Geschenk machen. Es wird alle daran erinnern, dass mit dem Ausmaß Seines Segens die Last der Verantwortung größer wird. Und für jene, deren Glaube unter dieser Last zerbricht, gibt es keinen anderen Ausweg als die Reinigung durch heiliges Feuer." {n}Der Inquisitor spricht gedämpft und überlegt und betont jedes einzelne Wort.{/n}

languages.text: 「ご存じのように、信仰は贖罪を許さない。したがって、悔い改める必要も意味もありません。しかし、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}皇帝の恩恵{/g}によって、シベリアは{g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}コロナス・エクスパンス{/g}に最後の贈り物をします。それは、皇帝の恩恵を多く受けたほど、責任の重さが増すことを思い出させるものです。そして、その重さに信仰の支柱が折れる者には、聖なる炎による清めしかありません。」{n}審問官の声は抑えられ、慎重に語られる。その言葉は重みを持つ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You see, there is neither need nor use in repentance, for our faith grants no redemption. But by the grace of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, Seberian will furnish the {g|Encyclopedia:KoronusExpanseGlossary}Koronus Expanse{/g} with one final gift. It will serve as a reminder that the more one earns of His blessings, the heavier the burden of responsibility becomes. And for those whose backbone of faith should break under that burden, there is no other way but cleansing with holy fire." {n}The Inquisitor's voice sounds muted and measured, lending weight to every word.{/n}
